scope: Morilee Vizcaya Shopify products.json, one catalog row per color, with product-page detail enrichment
notes: Variant sku is treated as style_number.
Sizes are intentionally omitted; Bellas owns size lists per style.
Public codes are null because the app will mint them when catalog rows are created.
Shopify price is intentionally ignored because Morilee exposes placeholder pricing.
Visible product-page attributes are captured in attributes but not imported yet.
Product-page collection, short description, swatch metadata, and image metadata are captured for future staff workflows.

items.product_title: Beatriz Quinceañera Dress
items.short_description_html: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress is a fitted, sweetheart mini dress with intricate beaded lace, sheer sides, and detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves with a detachable gown skirt featuring 3D floral appliqué, a ruffle overskirt, and a detachable crystal-beaded double loop bow.
items.short_description_text: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress is a fitted, sweetheart mini dress with intricate beaded lace, sheer sides, and detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves with a detachable gown skirt featuring 3D floral appliqué, a ruffle overskirt, and a detachable crystal-beaded double loop bow.

source.title: Beatriz Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Meet our Beatriz quinceañera dress, a gown that does both drama and fun. A sweeping glitter tulle overskirt, embellished with 3D floral appliqués, floats around you with every step, finished with a crystal-beaded double-loop bow for that extra sparkle. When the party heats up, remove the overskirt to reveal a chic mini dress beneath, complete with a strapless sweetheart neckline, sheer sides, and a beaded lace bodice that shines from every angle. Detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves let you switch up your look, making this a multi-dimensional design made for your big entrance and every moment after.

items.product_title: Blake Quinceañera Dress
items.short_description_html: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress has a sheer corset bodice with a sweetheart neckline, crystal draping, and intricate 3D floral appliqués on a basque waist ball gown skirt featuring 3D florals, a glitter tulle motif, and a detachable back bow.
items.short_description_text: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress has a sheer corset bodice with a sweetheart neckline, crystal draping, and intricate 3D floral appliqués on a basque waist ball gown skirt featuring 3D florals, a glitter tulle motif, and a detachable back bow.

source.title: Blake Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Bold sparkle meets dreamy romance in our Blake quinceañera dress. The sheer corset bodice stuns with a sweetheart neckline, crystal draping, and intricate 3D floral appliqués that catch the light with every move. The basque waist ball gown skirt blooms into full princess drama, layering glitter tulle and dimensional florals for a look that feels straight out of a modern fairytale. A detachable back bow adds the perfect finishing touch for a look that's sweet, glamorous, and totally unforgettable.

items.product_title: Brianna Quinceañera Dress
items.short_description_html: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress has a sheer, boned bodice with an exaggerated sweetheart neckline, a detachable crystal and pearl draped choker, and detachable crystal embellished sleeves on a basque waist and cascading ruffle ball gown skirt adorned with sequin lace appliqués and a detachable flower back bow.
items.short_description_text: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress has a sheer, boned bodice with an exaggerated sweetheart neckline, a detachable crystal and pearl draped choker, and detachable crystal embellished sleeves on a basque waist and cascading ruffle ball gown skirt adorned with sequin lace appliqués and a detachable flower back bow.

source.title: Brianna Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Get ready for main-character magic in our Brianna quinceañera dress. This glitter tulle stunner features a sheer, boned bodice with an exaggerated sweetheart neckline that feels daring yet ultra-romantic. Style it your way with a detachable crystal and pearl draped choker and matching crystal-embellished sleeves for extra sparkle. The basque waist flows into a cascading ruffle skirt, shimmering with sequin lace appliqués that dazzle from every angle. Finished with a detachable floral back bow, Brianna is the perfect blend of drama, glamour, and customizable couture.

items.product_title: Brooklyn Quinceañera Dress
items.short_description_html: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress has a sweetheart neckline on a crystal-encrusted, sequin lace bodice with corset boning and detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves on a basque waist ball gown skirt with a ruffle peplum, swirling sequin lace, and a detachable back bow.
items.short_description_text: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress has a sweetheart neckline on a crystal-encrusted, sequin lace bodice with corset boning and detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves on a basque waist ball gown skirt with a ruffle peplum, swirling sequin lace, and a detachable back bow.

source.title: Brooklyn Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Sparkle like it’s your spotlight moment in our Brooklyn quinceañera dress. The sweetheart bodice shines with crystal-encrusted sequin lace and structured corset boning, giving you a glam, sculpted look that still feels effortlessly sweet. From the basque waist, the glitter tulle ball gown flares into full-volume magic, featuring a playful ruffle peplum and swirling sequin lace that twinkles with every step. A detachable back bow adds the perfect finishing flourish giving you a gown that's chic, feminine, and totally picture-perfect.

source.title: Bianca Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Step into sparkling elegance with our Bianca quinceañera dress. The sheer corset bodice dazzles with sequin and beaded floral lace, framed by a romantic sweetheart neckline and detachable off-the-shoulder angel sleeves for drama and versatile style. The basque waist flows into a full glitter tulle ball gown skirt, adorned with cascading sequin and beaded floral lace that sparkles from every angle. A detachable back bow completes this enchanting look, perfect for the quinceañera who wants timeless glamour with a modern twist.

source.title: Bliss Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: You might just be in heaven wearing our Bliss quinceañera dress. The sheer, boned bodice features a romantic sweetheart neckline and flounced off-the-shoulder sleeves, detachable for versatility, and sparkling with crystal beading, chandelier beading, and delicate 3D florals. From the basque waist, the lace ball gown skirt flows into a dramatic silhouette, accented with a peplum, intricate patterned glitter tulle appliqués, and a grand detachable double-loop bow, perfect for the quinceañera ready to make a dazzling entrance.

source.title: Brissa Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Make every moment unforgettable in our Brissa quinceañera dress. The shimmer satin gown dazzles with a crystal-encrusted bodice featuring linear and chandelier beading, finished with a sparkling brooch detail at the sweetheart neckline. From the basque waist, the full skirt blooms with 3D floral appliqués, while detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves and a double-loop bow let you customize your look for maximum drama and elegance. Perfect for the quinceañera who wants sparkle, style, and show-stopping flair.

items.short_description_text: Glitter tulle quinceañera dress with a stylized, butterfly wing-inspired cat eye neckline on a crystal-encrusted bodice featuring sheer sides on a basque waist ball gown skirt with sequin beaded floral appliqués, sparkle motif, and flounced detailing with a detachable back bow.

source.title: Becky Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Soar into your quinceañera celebration in our Becky dress, where sparkle meets playful elegance. The glitter tulle gown features a stylized, butterfly wing-inspired cat-eye neckline atop a crystal-encrusted bodice with sheer sides for a modern, radiant touch. From the basque waist, the full ball gown skirt dazzles with sequin-beaded floral appliqués, sparkling motifs, and flounced detailing that add movement and drama. A detachable back bow completes the look, perfect for a quinceañera who wants to shine from every angle.

source.title: Barbara Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Step into sparkling elegance in our Barbara quinceañera dress, designed for the girl who wants a timeless yet show-stopping look. The glitter tulle gown features a strapless scoop neckline with a peek-a-boo sweetheart detail atop a corset bodice encrusted with lace and crystal appliqués. Detachable lace-appliquéd cap sleeves with delicate crystal swag trim add versatile glamour, while the basque waist ball gown skirt shimmers with metallic lace appliqués. A matching detachable back bow completes the design, perfect for a quinceañera ready to shine from every angle.

Floral choker included.

source.title: Bridgette Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Make a cinematic entrance in our Bridgette quinceañera dress, the ultimate expression of elegance and ultra-glamour. The shimmer organza and liquid satin gown features a soft scoop neckline with a peek-a-boo sweetheart detail, adorned with allover 3D florals and beaded appliqués. Detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves add romantic versatility, flowing seamlessly from the boned bodice into a full ball gown skirt layered with sparkling beaded floral appliqués and dimensional 3D flowers. A detachable matching back bow completes the ultra-glam look, and a coordinating floral choker adds the perfect finishing touch for your fairytale look.

source.title: Aliea Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Our Aliea Quinceañera dress radiates modern elegance in glitter tulle with metallic beaded floral appliqués that have a gilded look. The sweetheart neckline and sheer midriff are framed by structured boning for classic corset bodice with a lace-up back and a a show-stopping double-loop appliqué bow. The detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves that let you switch up your style, off-the-shoulder for your grand entrance and strapless to dance the night away.

source.title: Alaina Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Make your grand entrance in our Alaina Quinceañera dress, designed for the quince girl who’s ready to shine.The plunging sweetheart neckline and structured boning create a flawless, sculpted silhouette, while the corset back adds a classic look. Detachable floral appliqué sleeves bring soft, romantic detail, and a matching double-loop bow at the back adds the perfect finishing touch.

source.title: Audrey Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Designed for the modern princesa, our Audrey Quinceañera dress has delicate thin straps that frame a sweetheart neckline, while crystal boning and a sheer midriff add structure and sparkle to the fitted bodice. The corset back enhances your silhouette, giving you that perfect, cinched-in shape, while the floral glitter peplum and intricate beaded lace appliqué create texture and shine across the full skirt. Detachable elements, like the airy balloon sleeves, a crystal-studded belt, and a glitter tulle floral Watteau train, allow you to customize your look.

source.title: Alessandra Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Step into your spotlight in our Alessandra Quinceañera dress, a stunning strapless gown, designed to make your quince feel like a true fairytale. The plunging sweetheart neckline and sculpted boning create a flawless fit, while the corset back adds classic quince glamour. Cascading into a voluminous tiered skirt, the gown is adorned with romantic rosette appliqués that add depth, texture, and dreamy dimension. The detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves and a dramatic double-loop bow with flowing tails complete the look with elegance and flair. Halter is for styling only.

source.title: Alora Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Dazzle in a gown made for a once-in-a-lifetime moment. Our Alora Quinceañera dress has strapless sweetheart neckline with a structured, boned bodice and sheer midriff that adds just the right touch of modern flair. The corset back ensures a flawless fit, while a ruffled peplum detail adds volume and drama to the waist. Shimmering with sequins, beading, and delicate floral motifs, the glitter tulle skirt sparkles from every angle. Detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves add a romantic finish, and the dramatic double-tail bow, with matching floral embellishments, completes your look.

Shimmering with sequins, beading, and delicate floral motifs, the glitter tulle skirt sparkles from every angle. Detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves add a romantic finish, and the dramatic double-tail bow, with matching floral embellishments, completes your look.

items.short_description_text: Ball gown has a sweetheart neckline with metallic threadwork butterfly motif with detachable puff sleeves and bow.

source.title: Andrea Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Embrace whimsy and sparkle in our Andrea Quinceañera dress. The sweetheart neckline and boning detail shape the ball gown silhouette, while a corset back adds classic elegance. Metallic threadwork butterflies flutter across the glitter tulle, weaving delicate ruffles that bring movement and magic to dress. Detachable tulle puff sleeves offer a soft, romantic touch, and a matching double-loop bow adorned with metallic butterfly motifs completes the look.

items.product_title: Ana Quinceañera Dress

source.title: Ana Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Make a lasting impression in our Ana Quinceañera dress. The bodice glows with intricate sequins and beading in floral and leaf motifs, while delicate rosette details add soft, dimensional beauty. A classic corset back shapes the silhouette to perfection, leading into a full glitter tulle skirt that sparkles with every step. The look is finished with a detachable bow at the back, featuring embroidered threadwork organza and a floral center that adds couture-level charm.

source.title: Aminita Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Our Aminita Quinceañera dress is designed to dazzle on your special day. The sweetheart neckline and boned bodice creates a sculpted silhouette, while the corset back adds structure and charm. Shimmering floral appliqués, accented with sequins and beading, bloom across the glitter tulle, adding sparkle and dimension from every angle. For added versatility, the gown features a detachable off-the-shoulder drape and a dramatic double-loop bow with flowing tails, intricately embellished to match the gown’s floral details.

source.title: Alicia Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Sparkle with every step in our Alicia Quinceañera dress. The sweetheart neckline and crystal boning detail sculpt the bodice for a flawless fit, while the corset back creates a custom fit. Dazzling floral appliqués—glimmering with crystal sequins—cascade across layers of glitter tulle, creating a look that sparkles from every angle. A detachable satin draped sleeve adds a soft, romantic touch, while a cascading ruffle double-tail bow completes the look with dramatic flair.

source.title: Angelica Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Graceful and glittering, our Angelica Quinceañera dress is made for your grand entrance. Featuring a classic square neckline and shimmering sequin boning, the structured bodice creates a sculpted silhouette with a corset back. The basque waist adds regal charm, leading into layers of glitter tulle and a floral appliqué embroidered overlay that glows with soft sparkle. Detachable off-the-shoulder sleeves with satin detail offer romantic versatility, while a matching satin embroidered bow completes the look.

source.title: Alexis Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Our Alexis Quinceañera dress is soft, romantic, and full of sparkle. The sweetheart neckline and delicate thin straps create a beautiful frame, while crystal boning and a sheer midriff add modern structure and shine. A soft basque waist leads into a voluminous glitter tulle skirt, blooming with rosette-inspired floral embroidery that catches the light with every twirl. The corset back ensures a perfect, sculpted fit, while a detachable glitter tulle bow is a playful, customizable touch.

source.title: Aubree Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Designed for the girl who loves detail and drama, our Aubree Quinceañera dress has a strapless sweetheart bodice featuring crystal boning and a sheer midriff, giving structure and sparkle in all the right places. A corset back ensures a flawless fit, while a soft peplum flows into a cascading glitter tulle skirt that shimmers with every step. For a customizable look, add or remove the crystal-embroidered tulle halter neck and off-shoulder sleeves—perfect for switching up your style throughout the night. A crystal-trimmed, double-loop bow at the back completes the look with elegant, radiant flair.

source.title: Antonia Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: For the girl who loves to sparkle, our Antonia Quinceañera dress features a sweetheart neckline and sheer midriff to create a modern yet timeless silhouette, while the corset back ensures a flawless fit. Layers of glitter tulle come to life with floral and sequin dimensional patterns that add depth, texture, and magical shine. Soft off-the-shoulder drapes offer a romantic touch, while a detachable satin bow—designed to match the gown’s dimensional floral pattern—adds a statement finish

source.title: Antonella Quinceañera Dress

items.description_html: Live out your princess moment in our Antonella Quinceañera dress. The structured bodice features delicate boning and a flattering corset back, accentuated by a graceful basque waist that enhances your silhouette. Layers of glitter tulle, organza, and lace floral appliqués cascade into a tiered back skirt, creating breathtaking movement and depth. Detachable long sleeves adorned with matching floral appliqués add a touch of timeless elegance, while a detachable satin bow with lace details completes the ensemble with soft, romantic charm.
